title: Become an AI Native Cloud Engineer
summary: The video argues that coding alone is no longer the differentiator for junior cloud engineers, as AI can generate infrastructure code (Kubernetes, Terraform, Lambda, CI/CD). Instead, junior engineers should focus on understanding fundamentals (security, reliability, cost, performance, maintainability) and use AI agents to accelerate work while validating outputs against those principles.
